title: Bramble - Pack 9" Frisbee Flying Disc Saucers for Kids & Adults Outdoor Fun Play Activity - 3 Assorted Colours, 23cm
features: 🟢 EYE CATCHING COLOURS - The 12-pack of frisbees come in bright, vibrant colours of green, blue, and yellow that are sure to attract attention and add a fun, playful vibe to any outdoor gathering.

🟢 ENDLESS FUN - Our frisbees are perfect for family and friends to enjoy together in the park, beach or backyard, and great as a dog frisbee. With hours of fun and laughter, these frisbees are great for kids and adults alike and can liven up garden parties and family gatherings.

🟢 PREMIUM QUALITY - Our frisbees are made of high-quality PP plastic, ensuring they are solid and durable for long-lasting play. This ensures that they can withstand wear and tear, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor use.

🟢 DIMENSIONS - Each frisbee for kids has a product dimension of 23 x 23 cm and a weight of 75 grams per piece, which makes them easy to handle and throw. The pack of 12 frisbees has a weight of 0.937 kgs, making them easy to transport and store.

🟢 GREAT VALUE - This pack of 12 frisbees is a fantastic value for money, providing endless hours of fun for a group of people at a very affordable price. You won't have to worry about running out of frisbees or having to buy more after just a few uses.
description: Introducing our pack of brightly coloured frisbees - the perfect addition to any outdoor gathering, or as a dog frisbee! Whether you're planning a trip to the beach, a picnic in the park or a backyard barbecue, these frisbees are sure to add an extra element of fun to your day. Each frisbee comes in a vibrant shade of green, blue or yellow that is guaranteed to catch the eye and liven up any game. The colours are bright and attractive, making them easy to spot and adding to the overall enjoyment of the game. Not only are these frisbees fun, but they are also made of premium quality PP plastic, making them solid and durable for long-lasting play. You can rest assured that they will withstand wear and tear, even with frequent use, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor activities. At 23 x 23 cm in size and weighing just 75 grams each, these frisbees are easy to handle and throw, making them perfect for kids and adults alike. They are lightweight enough to fly through the air with ease, yet substantial enough to withstand the occasional rough landing.
